D4 Colorimetry L5 Evaluate Reference

The ICC Profile Chain

follow one colour from a source device through the D50 connection space and out to a destination device, value by value

Colour management never converts device-to-device directly. The source profile maps device RGB into a device-independent connection space (the PCS, anchored to D50); the destination profile maps the PCS back out to its own RGB. Each link is a matrix plus a chromatic adaptation.

Choose the source and destination spaces and the input hue. The chain shows the XYZ values entering the PCS, the Bradford-adapted D50 values inside it, and the destination RGB. A clip warning appears when the destination cannot reproduce the colour.
